_comment2: SENSITIVE RULES CONFIGURATION — User-extensible keyword lists
_comment4: This file allows you to add domain-specific keyword lists that
_comment5: the ML model cannot cover (e.g. proprietary corporate terms,
_comment9: - enabled:  whether this category is active
_comment15: in the same directory to activate.

gambling_keywords.description: Gambling-related terms — add your own word list here
